office_does: A state representative writes and votes on state laws and budgets, conducts oversight, and represents their legislative district.
race_blurb: An incumbent legislator and former school-board member faces a business owner and community organizer whose platform emphasizes affordability, housing, and safety without detailed mechanisms.

candidates.summary: Perez is a business owner, community organizer, and working mother campaigning on affordability, housing, small businesses, and community safety.
highlights: Brings business, organizing, and lived working-family experience [S2]
Emphasizes affordability, housing, small businesses, and community safety [S2]

experience.basis: She is a community and business outsider with no documented elected or institutional record.

candidates.summary: Morgan is a legislator, former school-board member, veteran, and community advocate with an official record spanning health, housing, and consumer protections.
highlights: Brings legislative and prior elected school-board experience [S2]
Official work emphasizes health-care access, behavioral-health parity, consumer protections, housing, and equity [S2]

experience.basis: She combines legislative service with prior elected school-board experience.
